case_title: SET PROMOTIONS, LLC VS. BRAND FORCE , INC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RORY W. CLARK (ATTORNEY FOR PALINTIFF) RE: INTEREST COMPUTATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SET PROMOTIONS, LLC
